title: Gamma Base
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Structure |image=[[File:GammaBase.jpg]] |name=Gamma Base |constructed= |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault]]'' manual ([[Wikipedia:Sega CD|Sega CD]]) |interest= |rebuilt= |builder= |height= |width= |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] }} {{Quote|Gamma Base, I have positive identification of an Imperial probe droid.'''"
"'''Copy that, Rookie One. Destroy it. We'll begin evacuation procedures.|Rookie One and a [[Unidentified Gamma Base communications officer|communications officer]]|''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault]]''}} '''Gamma Base''' was the name of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. ==History== The base was populated by a small group of Rebels around the time of the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tatooine]]. [[Rookie One]] relocated there after the [[Anchorhead Base]] was destroyed during that battle in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. It was discovered by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droids]] and subsequently [[Battle of Hoth (0 BBY)|attacked]] by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces which included [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]]. Rookie One managed to shoot one walker with his [[Snowspeeder/Legends|snowspeeder]] and made his way to the hangar and escape along with the rest of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel fleet]] as the base was overrun by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] and [[Cold assault stormtrooper|Snowtroopers]]. ==Personnel== [[File:Not_Rieekan_and_Navander.jpg|thumb]] *[[Unidentified Gamma Base commander|Gamma Base commander]] *[[Unidentified Gamma Base communications officer|Gamma Base communications officer]] *[[Rookie One]] *[[Ru Murleen]] (possibly) ==Behind the scenes== Gamma Base was created for the [[1993]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault]]''. The planet on which Gamma Base is located is never identified in the game itself, but both the manual for the [[Wikipedia:Sega CD|Sega CD]] version and the box for the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] version identify the ice-world as Hoth. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{GalaxyCite|4|Game Room|Game Room: Playing Empire Games}} {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Alliance to Restore the Republic military bases]] [[Category:Hoth locations]]
